user.title: Configure iHidro Romania
user.description: Enter your iHidro.ro (Hidroelectrica Romania) account credentials. The browser service URL points to the ihidro-browser microservice used for meter reading submission via the web portal.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid credentials. Please check your username and password.
error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to iHidro server. Please check your internet connection.
error.unknown: Unknown error occurred. Check Home Assistant logs.

abort.already_configured: This iHidro account is already configured.

init.title: iHidro Options
init.description: Configure options for the iHidro integration.

submit_meter_reading.name: Submit Meter Reading
submit_meter_reading.description: Submit electricity meter reading to Hidroelectrica for a specific POD.
